calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert C. Ward, Esq. appeared for plaintiff PPF OFF 150 California Street Limited Partnership, successor in interest to CA-150 California Street Limited Partnership.
Stacia Keisner, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Jesup & Lamont, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on September 30, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 24, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff PPF OFF 150 California Street Limited Partnership, successor in interest to CA-150 California Street Limited Partnership, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jesup & Lamont, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $44,111.00.
Attorney's Fees - $7,611.00.
Costs - $425.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $52,147.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
